title: Acranthera mutabilis
taxonomy: Acranthera mutabilis is classified in the family Rubiaceae. This classification places it within the order Gentianales, which is a group of flowering plants. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group that includes many species of plants commonly known as coffee, gardenias, and jasmine. Acranthera mutabilis is a member of the tribe Psychotrieae within the Rubiaceae family. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships to other plants in the Gentianales order.

Its leaves are believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases.
